_doc: Machine-owned trust anchor (per D21). Installed modules + versions + install-hashes + ejected files + slot assignments + day-1 validator floor. Users must NOT edit this file; the framework can no longer trust the state if they do. Hand-editable per-module overrides live in .polsia/overrides.json. Path -> tier mapping lives in .polsia/ownership.json (generated from installed manifests).
_note_day_1_floor: Templates are scaffolds with the shadcn/UI baseline shipped IN the template (components.json + cn() + a committed base primitive set + a next-themes ThemeProvider + a token-driven theme), plus the framework-native default DB client (Prisma for template-next). This floor is the scaffold-applicable validator set plus the data checks the baked-in DB client makes runnable on day 1. Other module-specific validators ship in module manifests and are added when those modules install. Validator names must exist in Polsia-Inc/modules/validators/README.md.
